u001.name: Alice Tan

wellness_metrics.resilience_summary: Highly resilient: A solid liquidity buffer supports stability, but only limited visible weaknesses could amplify stress during shocks.
action_insights: Maintain current buffers and rebalance periodically to preserve resilience.

u002.name: Brandon Lim

u011.name: Zerius Heng

wellness_metrics.resilience_summary: Financially fragile: Some baseline financial capacity supports stability, but limited liquid reserves could amplify stress during shocks.
action_insights: Build emergency savings toward 3 to 6 months of expenses.
Lower unsecured liabilities to improve shock absorption and monthly flexibility.
Reduce concentration in a single volatile asset class and broaden diversification.
